content.body: Has anyone looked into why `dfn.js` or whatever we are using these days in HTML does not work on whatpr.org?
content.formatted_body: Has anyone looked into why dfn.js or whatever we are using these days in HTML does not work on whatpr.org?

content.body: Okay, it seems like the problem is that it's looking for it in the wrong place. I wonder if it would be as simple as making those links point to html.spec.whatwg.org.
